resources.string: Network connection failed. Please try again later.
When alarm starts ringing, the alarm screen pops up immediately so that you can easily dismiss the alarm.
"It's an index indicating how successful your morning was based on alarm records."
Energy close to 100 implies a fresh morning.
We calculate how consistently you woke up for alarms between 3 and 11 am.
The faster and more consistently you wake up, the higher your energy gets!
Make your morning better with Alarmy!
Check your daily morning energy and
Update your payment method or try a different payment method.
you’ve started a day with Alarmy for the past
How to opt out of personalized ads
In accordance with our privacy policy, we hereby introduce how to opt out of personalized ads.

"1. Please find Google account setting screen in your device.
2. Move to \"Ads\" and you'll see \"Opt out of Ads Personalization\" feature. Please enable it."
You can upload up to 3 files.
File is too large. The maximum file size allowed is 50 MB.
You can add up to 4 times
We’ll let you know when your alarm rings, snoozes, or when Wake up check starts.
"Alarm list and setting screens finally turned into dark mode"
"Simple & clean home screen! Alarm wallpaper is still there."
Wish your %s be filled with love and happiness!
Mute during mission: Total %1$d times, used %2$d times
Mute during mission is turned off.
Allow permissions to make sure your alarms ring. Permission may vary by device manufacturer.
Alarm expired: 30 minutes passed after alarm time.
Please fill in the alarm name
"If you're facing any problems, contact us!"
"Alarms may be blocked by the phone's system. 😢 Check the following guidelines!"
We need alarm permission to wake you up exactly on time
Your alarm will ring at this volume
If notifications are turned off, you won’t see or hear anything when alarms ring
Mic access is needed to measure your breath
Allow Alarmy in Do Not Disturb mode
Didn’t sleep much compared to time in bed
Spent enough time asleep in bed
Slept for a decent amount of time in bed
Use sleep mode and see how you slept!
Don’t forget to start sleep mode tonight!
Please press \"Continue\" if you choose to start using our app.
Enable the Creative Debugger SDK settings in order to view recent ads.
Displays more info about the list item.
To use %s you must agree to our Terms & Conditions and affirm you have reviewed our Privacy Policy
To use %s you must affirm that you have reviewed and acknowledged our Privacy Policy.
Found why you struggled to wake up
Your full sleep report is here
"Allow tracking on the next screen for:"
If you’re using battery saving or battery optimizing feature, Alarmy may be terminated forcefully. Then your alarms can’t ring.
Go to [Settings > Apps > Alarmy > Battery] and select “Unrestricted”.
※ For some devices, also add Alarmy to the list in [Device management > Battery > Apps not optimized].
For those who experienced the payment inconvenience,
Please receive a 50% off coupon prepared with our apologies.
Automatic payment after free trial ends (in 7 days)
Cannot find the photo to proceed
Cannot find the QR/barcode to proceed
Please undo skip to duplicate alarm
You can only skip enabled alarms
You can only skip repeated alarms
You can participate in the challenge by tapping the [Start Challenge] button.
You must dismiss the alarm at least once a day based on the date to maintain a record of success.
After completing the challenge, tap the gift button to get a random reward.
When the reward expires, you can try again.
Waking up for %s days in a row, amazing!
I hope you like the gift we prepared!
You must dismiss the alarm within 24 hours after tapping [Start Challenge], so that Day 1 to be recorded.
The challenge considers only dismissed alarm records as successful.
The challenge ends if there are any days during which the alarm is not used.
"If you delete the app, all records and benefits will disappear, so don't delete it and enjoy the benefits until the end."
This event may end without prior notice.
Be sure to check the notes below!
Are you taking on a challenge?
Let’s wake up like this again tomorrow
The finish line is just around the corner
Cheer up for just one last day
You can change this anytime in Settings.
"Pick objects that get you out of bed"
"Which object will you scan to stop the alarm?"
Check your network connection and try again
See how you slept last night
I wake up in the middle of the night for no reason
It takes me more than 30 minutes to fall asleep
I sleep less than 6 hours a night
I’ve been told that I snore often.
Find out changes in your sleep
"We've got your back for better mornings!"
We need your Auto start permission
"😱 Don't let your alarms stay silent"
The following permissions are required for smooth alarm usage
Code not selected. Please select a code.
"Cannot establish network connection. Please try again later."
"We have no updates. Please check again later."
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Please raise the system volume to hear ringtone previews.
Payment completion is required to receive discount benefits
Please fill in all the information
We save your sleep, wake-up, feeling records
"You can't edit this alarm %1$s minutes before it rings. This alarm will ring in %2$s minutes."
Deleting your account will NOT cancel your subscription.
Are you sure to delete it?
"Currently in use with another alarm. Are you sure to delete it?"
Are you sure to delete all alarms?
Accept our data processing and close the consent management view
accept our data processing and close the consent notice
token composed of a long chain of characters
User ID composed of a long chain of characters
acknowledge and close the consent notice
%{vendorName} stores cookies for the duration of your browsing session.
Agree to all purposes for the best experience
Agree to all vendors for the best experience

We collect some personal data like your IP address or the browser’s cookies and we sell it to third parties. This helps us in delivering personalized ads and to monitor and improve our service, but you can choose to opt-out from the sale using the button below.
Please visit our Privacy Policy for more information about your rights.

Your privacy

We collect some personal data like your IP address or the browser’s cookies and we sell it to third parties. This helps us in delivering personalized ads and to monitor and improve our service, but you can choose to opt-out from the sale using the button below.
Please visit our Privacy Policy for more information about your rights.

We and our partners place cookies, access and use non-sensitive information from your device for the following purposes:

  • Auditing Interactions with Consumers
  • Security
  • Debugging/Repair
  • Certain Short-term Uses
  • Performing Services
  • Internal Research for Tech Development
  • Quality and Safety Maintenance and Verification

You may accept the sale to third parties of all or part of the non-sensitive information. To learn more about cookies, partners, and how we use your data, visit our privacy policy
The California Consumer Privacy Act provides you with the option to opt-out from the selling of your data to third parties. You can apply granular choices to the following.
close and return to the consent management view
You can set your consent preferences for every partner listed below individually. Click on a partner name to get more information on what it does, what data it is collecting and how it is using it.
Data processing based on legitimate interest
Disable all the data processing described below
Disable all the partners listed below
Set all your preferences to save and continue
Enable all the data processing described below
Enable all the partners listed below
Scan this QR code with your phone or navigate to %{url}
close and return to the configuration view of the category %{categoryName}
close and return to configuration view of the partner %{vendorName}
close and return to the partners configuration view
close and return to the configuration view of the purpose %{targetName}
Close and return to the purposes configuration view
go to the purposes configuration view
%{name} participates in the IAB Transparency and Consent Framework and is subject to its policies. You can learn more about this partner and its data processing in its privacy policy.

%{name} participates in the IAB Transparency and Consent Framework and is subject to its policies. You can learn more about this partner and its data processing, and the way it manages legitimate interest, in its privacy policy.
Visit the \"IAB Transparency and Consent Framework\" website
Open our privacy policy in your default browser
By agreeing to the purposes above, you also allow this app and its partners to operate the following data processing:
No sensitive personal information has been defined by our partners
You can learn more about %{name} and its data processing in its privacy policy.

"With your agreement, we and our partners use device storage to store and access personal data like precise geolocation data, and identification through device scanning.
We process that data for purposes like personalised ads and content, ad and content measurement, audience insights and product development.
You can withdraw your consent or object to data processing based on legitimate interest at any time by going to \"Consent Preferences\" in the menu of this app."
Know more details about this partner
This partner also uses other methods like \"local storage\" to store and access information on your device.
This partner processes the following categories of data:
This partner stores the following data on your device:

We and our partners use non-sensitive information from your device to improve our products and personalize ads and other contents throughout this app. You may accept all or part of these operations. To learn more about how we use your data, to review your options or these operations for each partner, visit our privacy policy.
Examples illustrating how our partners process data based on this purpose:
Refuse our data processing and close the consent management view
refuse our data processing and close the consent notice
Reset all the data processing described below
Reset all the partners listed below
Save your preferences and close the consent management view
Save your choice and return to the partners configuration view
save your preferences and go back to the purpose configuration view
save your partners preferences and go back to the purpose configuration view
Know more about the storage of your choices
The choices you make regarding the purposes and entities listed in this notice are saved in the following keys:
About the storage of your choices
Main menu on the left, content on the right.
Here are your User ID and Token, unique identifiers for managing your consent preferences. Use them to request proof of consent or share with support if needed.
go to the next storage information
go to the previous storage information
%{vendorName} stores cookies with a maximum duration of about %{humanizedStorageDuration}
view partners for %{targetName} based on consent
view partners for %{targetName} based on legitimate interest
The gift will disappear if you leave. Is it okay?
Allow Alarmy to ring during DND mode.
Go to [Settings > Notifications > Do Not Disturb > Applications] and add Alarmy to the list.
※ The setting location may differ by device model and OS version.
Do you want to enable logging?
"Will be available to users after Alarmy's review"
Your video wallpaper will be set to default image if you change the alarm sound
Start your day with a smile
"Use when you're in an emergency situation!"
Follow the button and tap it to dismiss
You cannot continue the challenge if there are any days during which the alarm is not used.
This code has already been used.
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Necessary info for account deletion has been expired. If this persists, please leave us feedback.
"Alarm mission too easy or too hard?"
Alarm sound too loud or too quiet?
"We'll review your appeal and let you know via email."
Select the focus mode during which you want alarms to ring, especially Sleep.
"To proceed without consent, sign out from Alarmy account."
You didn’t consent to necessary policies
In order to keep using Alarmy’s account, we need your consent to collecting your personal information.
Volume gradually increase during the set time
Sound slowly increases to gently wake you up
Sound slowly increases to gently wake you up
We’ve got a gift for you

"Having a good day?
Enjoy the rest of the day!"

"Hope you had a great day.
Good night :)"
"If the problem persists even though you've never deleted the app, please send feedback."
Is the code your friends used the same as you entered?
It takes us time to fall asleep and we sometimes wake up during the night. These two are summed up to represent “Awake” time.
Physical recovery is the main role of this stage, such as cell renewal and tissue growth. It’s difficult to wake up from deep sleep for most people.
Typically takes up the most part of total sleep. Your brain works on recovering cognitive functions on this stage.
Known to help mental recovery such as improving memory and brain reactivation. At this stage, you may have some vivid dreams.
During sleep, our brain and body recover themselves. The process can be divided into 4 stages, each taking different roles in the recovery. It’s important to have a balanced proportion of each stage.
More precise sleep results are provided with microphone permission allowed
Didn’t have necessary permission at the time
Select the day(s) your alarm will ring
Your records will also be deleted
Give up on the goal today?
"Alarm to action! Morning habits made easy"
Set your habit goal and alarm time
Begin your habit at the alarm
"Make your dream mornings with Habit Alarm"
"Time for your habit goal! Do it and hit 'Complete'"
Please upgrade to use this feature
Wake up! Your daily fortune is here!
Manage your subscription for Alarmy Pro in Google Play.
Reward will not be received before video completion.
Enjoy your morning with easier wake-up
Try Alarmy for your weekend tasks. 🪄
"Ready to fall asleep? Leave it to Alarmy to wake you up. Let's set an alarm for a relaxing morning."
"Explore a new ringtone under 'Alarm bell' for a refreshing wake-up experience tomorrow!"
Use Alarmy to set a reminder and keep your plans on track for tomorrow!
"Explore a new ringtone under 'Loud' for a refreshing wake-up experience tomorrow!"
If you have any weekend tasks, why not use Alarmy to set reminders? Set it up now!
Wake up with Alarmy tomorrow and enjoy your morning with easier wake-up
If app is closed, alarm cannot ring
Real bear, standing or on four feet
Face of a person with beard
Whole bed visible in the room
From the side showing both wheels
From the side showing both wheels
Needed to recognize objects with camera
Fork, knife, or utensils up close
Fruit, vegetables, meat, or cooked food
Animal fur or fur clothing up close
From the front to see both lenses
Clear bottle or glass with juice
Full kitchen with counter and cabinets
Household item hunt needs camera permission
Piano keys showing black and white
Sink in the bathroom or kitchen
From the front to see both lenses
Overall shape with the lid up
Find Alarmy in the downloaded apps list and grant the permission.
Make sure to charge your phone!
Place your phone on the closest spot from your face
Not adjustable if your sound is silent
We analyze your sleep with your breathing
Turn off the screen to keep your room dark
"Let’s wake up easy but completely! All the paid features are free with a referral code!"
Did your friend submit the code?
Bring just one and instant reward
Your invited friend submits the code after signing up.
Enjoy Alarmy Pro for free with your friends.
Share your code with your friends.
Once the invitation is done, please tap the button \"Get Pro\".
You can only submit the code once
No friends have submitted their codes yet
You can get the reward only after the friend you invited submits the code.
Please note that all issued invitation codes & rewards will be reset once you delete the app,
The more friends you invite, the more rewards you get.

"Let’s wake up fully with Alarmy tomorrow! Pro is free for both of us with this invitation code after signing in!
Invitation code : %s "
"Invite friends and Unlock Pro for everyone!"
"There's a friend you invited for sure?"
"Use %stimes more to see fully personalized sleep score"
Cannot be used without adding a label
This is sample text. Wake up and hit the gym!
Had enough sleep compared to time in bed
Didn’t sleep much compared to time in bed
Oversleeping can also make you tired
Download required to change to %s. Continue?
Downloading another language. Try again later
Reach level 10 to draw a random Larmy
Always writing, never quite done. The first sentence has been rewritten 200 times, and the deadline is always tomorrow. But the belief that a masterpiece is coming? Unshakable.
"Larmy can change your whole day with one drink. The recipes live only in the head — the same drink is never made twice. That's why the regulars keep coming back."
Larmy has a nose for money like no other. Gold lines the streets on every walk, and markets move with every word. The allowance beats most company revenues. Totally normal, apparently.
Larmy can name every ingredient by smell alone. Hundreds of recipes live in the head, and finding new flavor combos is the greatest joy. Nothing is more satisfying than an empty plate.
Larmy got into delivery for the love of riding. The wind on the open road is when life feels most real. The deliveries are just an excuse — the real goal is seeing the world.
"Larmy rises before the sun and rests after it sets. Action comes before words, and those calloused hands are a point of pride. Today's work has never once been pushed to tomorrow."
The more dangerous, the faster Larmy runs toward it. Fear is nothing - the only thing that matters is saving people. Never lost the way, not even through smoke.
The whole hallway offers greetings on every walk. Seats clear in the cafeteria, and whatever team Larmy joins already won field day. Student body president on the first day as a transfer student.
Time stops when Larmy takes the stage. Eye contact stops hearts. A wave brings screams. The fan club waitlist wraps around the Earth three times.
"One call from Larmy moves the world. Has three off-the-map islands and a boardroom full of thrones. No one knows the name - not because no one does, but because those who do can't say it."
"Larmy can't walk past something broken. Pockets are always full of tools, and things come back better than before. The grease on that face? A badge of honor."
"Here's a new egg as a gift!"
What will Larmy grow up to be?
The beloved princess. Wherever Larmy sits becomes a throne, and flowers bloom in the wake. A wave starts a parade; a smile starts a festival.
I’m growing fast thanks to you!
"Still wobbling inside the shell, trying to find balance. A little food or a tiny treat might be all I need… the shell could crack any moment!"
"I finally evolved into full Larmy! Thank you so much for raising me all the way here. From now on, I’ll help you start every morning—so you’ll stay with me, right?"
"Whoa—there’s a small crack on my shell! I’m super curious but still a bit scared, only wiggling my toes. Maybe a little snack will give me the courage to pop out! 🙏"
"I peek through the crack, seeing the world for the first time. I'm tapping my feet, getting ready to step out… Just a bit more growth and I might really make it out!"
"Ta-da! I’m halfway out! Everything outside looks so fun—my heart’s racing already. Help me grow a tiny bit more so I can come out completely! 🥹"
"I am FREE from the egg at last! Tada! How do I look? Cute, right? Thanks for getting me out 💛 I’ll do my best to keep growing!"
"Look! I can walk now! I still tumble a lot, but I’m getting better every day. Keep stopping by—soon I’ll be running! 🔥"
"Now I walk confidently and use my new arms to touch everything! Hehe, thanks to you, I feel like I’m growing super fast!"
"Bye-bye, diapers! I’m zooming around all day because everything feels exciting. I’m growing so fast… can’t wait to be a big kid!"
"I can even whistle now! I’m good on my own, but it’s always more fun when you’re here. Come hang out with me often! 😗"
Thanks! You made me come this far.
Surprised at how much I grew?
Help me grow. I need points to level up.
"What’s out there? Can't wait to find out!"
My shell is starting to crack!
Hi! Can you see me now?
Almost ready to break free from my shell!
"A few more points and I think I'll grow legs!"
Wobble wobble- Still learning to walk
It’s amazing I can walk… Thanks!
"You don't still see me as a baby, do you?!"
I can do anything by myself now!
"I'm kid Larmy, I grew up well thanks to you!"
"I'm gonna be an even cooler Larmy!"
Come collect points tomorrow too, I’ll be waiting!
"Don't forget to use your alarm today!"
Grab your rewards before they disappear!
"Please tell me you're not trying to sleep forever??"
"You can call yourself a professional sleeper"
Oh hey... do I know you?
"You must love your bed more than me"
"Sleep won you over today Let's beat it tomorrow!"
"It's not too late. Use your alarm"
"I'll forgive you... if you just wake up"
You really love that bed huh?
"With us as a team, it's always a win"
"Maybe we try math mission level 3?! Easy peasy~"
What time you waking up tomorrow?
"Hey! I'm Larmy, great to meet you"
"The more I see you, the more energy I get! ⚡️⚡️"
"You're this good? Should be in textbooks lol"
"Fail to wake up? Haven't heard of that!"
"I've got this wake-up thing figured out"
Tomorrow is gonna be even better!
Our energy is through the roof 🔥
"Can't stop won't stop We're on fire rn!"
"It's been tough, but you totally nailed it!!"
"Just a little more for the perfect routine!"
"My fav sound is 'End of the world' 🚨"
"We can keep going together till the end!!"
"Our story is legendary! Must be remembered forever"
"We don't wake up - we rise! New myths every day"
"Every cell is clapping All 37 trillion of them"
"Making history every morning Someone's definitely writing this"
"Morning's so amazed that the sun's running late"
"Use your alarm and Larmy cheers up. Snooze or skip it, and Larmy gets sad."
"Experience the life 50 million users are enjoying for yourself"
Barcode scanning library for Android, using ZXing for decoding.
An error has occurred when fetching the license.
"Can't get your location. If this persists, please leave us a feedback."
"We’ll let you know of the exact prayer time with your exact location"
"No results found Please search by city name"
Please check if device location is off
"Location permission is required to receive weather notifications"
Location permission is needed to tell you the weather
Signed out due to session time-out
"Keep your record safe by signing in"
"Earn rewards for successful wake-ups. Win guaranteed points up to 10,000!"
Select \"Tap for Lucky ticket\" mission and set your alarm
Complete the mission and to receive 1 ticket

"・ Tickets are awarded upon completing the tap challenge mission ・ Points are credited when you scratch the ticket to reveal your results ・ Unscratched tickets will not award points ・ Tickets can only be scratched on the day they're received ・ Tickets expire after the day ends ・ A short ad will play before revealing your results ・ Points collected while logged out may be lost"
Daily prizes are awarded by ranking
Prize amounts and rank brackets may be adjusted based on participation levels
Tell other users about your win!
Got a gift first thing this morning
Great way to start the day!
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
You will not be rewarded after closing the window
Do you want to learn more?
Tap the button 100 times in 10 seconds!
"Complete the challenge for a chance to win 1000 USD daily"
"Event ends: Sep 9 Camera is for display only and won’t be saved."
"Tap 100 times in 10 seconds to win 1000 USD"
Win $1,000 daily. A lucky winner is chosen each day.
"100 taps in 10 seconds, Wake up the fun way"
"Don't have it? Pick again for a new item!"
Find the item on screen to turn off the alarm
"Find the color tiles, Wake up with focus"
"Something went wrong with your photo. Please register a new photo."
Photo does not match, please try again!
Photo not selected. Please select a photo.
Place a QR/Barcode inside the rectangle
"Recommend a mission alarm to your friends who were late today"
"Shake off your sleep, Move your body first"
Get out of bed and squat with your device
Get out of bed and walk around with your device
Tap the button %s times in 10 seconds!
"Tap %s times in 10 seconds to win 1000 USD"
"Event ends: Sep 26 Camera is for display only and won’t be saved."
Exchange points for Alarmy Pro pass
"%s taps in 10 seconds, Wake up the fun way"
1. Take supplements 2. Take a shower 3. Read books
All our dreams can come true, if we have the courage to pursue them.
"Try changing to a more effective mission!"
"Try changing to a popular alarm sound!"
Если закрыть рекламу до окончания таймера, награда за просмотр не будет начислена

Огромный выбор авто. Удобный поиск. Авто новые и с пробегом. Ежедневные обновления. Огромный выбор авто. Огромный выбор авто. Удобный поиск. Авто новые и с пробегом. Ежедневные обновления. Огромный выбор авто
Покупка и продажа элитных и дешёвых машин на Авто.ру
Есть противопоказания. Обратитесь к специалисту Есть противопоказания. Обратитесь к специалисту
How did you feel this morning?
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Set multiple missions in a row for more powerful start. Combinations like math + step + squat will wake you up in no time.
You can purchase with your points
Please check your network connection and try again.
Network issues: Only local sounds available
Network issues: Only local wallpapers available
Receive notifications of reminders and announcements.

"Weather notification will be off.
Please turn it on again when it becomes necessary."
This app does not have any open source licenses.
"Alarms may be blocked by the phone's system. 😢 Check the following guidelines!"

"By enabling the Accessibility Service, you agree to allowing Alarmy to detect the system UI of turning the device off.
The sole purpose is to prevent you from turning the device off while your alarm is ringing and won’t be used or shared for any other purpose."
"Video alarm is here 🎉 Pick your favorite video in the alarm editor"
We’ll let you know when new events open
"Congrats on winning MacBook 🎁 (AD) Check who won the challenge!"
Allow permission to ensure alarms work properly
Notification is off. Alarm cannot ring properly without the permission.
You snored %dmin last night. Check details in the app.
"Last night's sleep quality was %d. Check details in the app."
Turn on sleep analysis and focus on your sleep for tomorrow.
"Highest 2°C, Lowest -4°C. It's freezing today. Stay warm."
Alarmy will wake you up for sure. Good night!
"No alarm for tomorrow Check if there's any schedule you forgot."
"Check if there's any schedule you forgot."
Weather updates will arrive 15 minutes after your alarm
"Add Alarmy to your Control center for quick and easy access!"
Notifications help us ensure your alarm rings even in the background.
"You can turn off 'Display next alarm' in Settings"
Allow app to send you notifications?
You can change the settings anytime
"Boom! Extra loud effect to wake up instantly"
Complete each mission one by one
"Wake up for sure with Multiple mission"
"Best mission combo guarantees you'll wake up"
"Never fall back asleep with Wake up check"
"Low sleep efficiency makes you more tired"
"Find out what you did in your sleep"
"Your sleep pattern of the last three nights is here"
"Wake up to check fully analyzed report"
"Fall asleep deep and fast with scientific sounds"
Is my actual sleep time enough?
"You’re not taking as much sleep as you think"
Sleep with your phone next to you
"Thanks for your interest. We will share more once you're back online."
"You are back online! Let's pick up where we left off"
You are back online! Continue learning about %s
"We'll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site."
"Alarmy never fails to wake you up"
"The only alarm listed in medical journals"
"Top choice for a reason See for yourself"
Set the time to wake up
Choose a mission to make you wide awake
Setting up a refreshing wake-up sound
Setting up a mission to make you wide awake
"Trusted by 100M+ Your alarm is almost ready"
Location needed for automatic Fajr alarm
Allow location access for automatic Fajr alarm
Your alarm will ring %s Fajr every day!
Adjusts daily to local Fajr time
You’ll be notified on the time you set
Set the time you go to bed
"Get bedtime reminders to never miss tomorrow's plans"
"No more tired mornings Sleep to wake in one-go"
"What about on weekends? Try adjusting this alarm too! :)"
Tap to change the sound and mission
Unable to load the wallpaper. Please select another option.
Register your card to pay the penalty
Alarm rang but was not dismissed
Your appeal was accepted, thus the payment has been cancelled.
"We're reviewing your appeal. You'll be noted about further progress after the review is done."
Your appeal was denied, thus will proceed with the payment.
"In case you couldn't dismiss due to unavoidable circumstances, submit your appeal. We'll review and let you know the result via email."
In order to use this feature, you need to register a credit/debit card supported by the payment service.
If we do not detect your alarm snooze or dismiss signal within 3 hours from the ring time, you’ll be charged 24 hours after the alarm’s initial ring time.

"In case you couldn't dismiss due to unavoidable circumstances, you can appeal before the payment schedule. Explain what happened and we'll review your appeal. If you were already charged, we cannot undo it."
You can delete your card info when you desire to. Note that the feature will be turned off if you delete your card info.
Penalty fee will be charged in an hour
Penalty fee will be charged in %s hours
If you submit an appeal about why you couldn’t dismiss your alarm, we’ll refund the penalty fee.
"Haven't cheated at all. Keep it going!"
Turned the power off to cheat your alarms?
Refund times may vary by card company.
Refund is available for penalty within 30 days of charge.
"If you cheat your ringing alarm, you'll be charged the penalty fee"
Put penalty fee on my cheating self!
Make a pledge with yourself to pay penalty fee if you cheat your alarm.
Alarmy is tracking all your alarms
When we detect you cheating, we’ll send a payment mail to your account mail
Penalty fee charge mail will be sent
After 24 hours from the alarm time you cheated on, you’ll be charged the penalty fee you selected
Head back to the app and experience Pro!
Keep enjoying the powerful features of Pro ☀️
Your Pro free trial ends in 2 days!
"Try Pro free for 7 days No auto-charge today"
"Invest not in Alarm but in your Morning"
"We double check if you’re awake after alarm. No more falling back asleep!"
"Sign in to get the best offer now"
Tap count increases every time you dismiss using emergency mode
We can detect your power-off action
"We can detect your power-off action. *If Alarmy isn't detecting even though you allowed it, retrieve the permission and allow it again."
Please allow Display over apps permission
Allows Alarmy to keep displaying dismiss screen, even while snoozing!
"To allow Alarmy to keep displaying dismiss screen, please grant 3 permissions. *Display pop-up window (both), Show on Lock screen"
Take a photo like the example
"Take a photo of a part of your morning routine"
"Contact us and we'll resolve this quickly"
Use your points in Shop now
License details for open source software
Work out to dismiss Squat and Step mission
Wake Up Check keeps ringing until you really wake up
Complete a series of missions to dismiss Multiple Mission
Complete multiple missions in a row to dismiss your alarm.
Feel the power of 2 or 3 consecutive missions
None of the Pro features are applied
With Pro Alarm, it’d be 160% easier to change your morning
Alarm becomes much stronger with Pro
My Alarm became %s🔺 stronger than Free Alarm
Alarm’s got reborn much stronger with Pro
Prevent your morning self from cheating alarms.
You can hide the dialog that appears before closing the app.

"After using Alarmy for about 2 years, my life changed. I used to oversleep a lot, but now my day starts from 9AM with daily schedule. I'm trying to better my habit by setting the alarm 15 minutes ahead."
"Thank you for a wonderful app. I've been so happy for the last 250 days or so. News, weather and daily predictions helped my morning a lot. I appreciate your work, developers."

"This is the only app that made me wake up on time despite my irregular sleep pattern. Especially, solving math questions to dismiss alarms makes my brain so alert. It's hard to find an app this good. I recommend it to students like myself."
I love this app. Someone had to shake me out of sleep but Alarmy wakes me right up. Thanks to you, I can spend a productive day. Math mission is my favorite; hard multiplications make me smarter.

Before, at least 5 alarms were necessary to wake me up. But after using this app, a single alarm always does the trick. This is the best alarm app on store. You made my life 100 times easier. Thank you for this amazing work!
Hold the device and do squats to dismiss your alarm.
Hold the device and take steps to dismiss your alarm.
Type the displayed sentence to dismiss your alarm.
You now have access to all of all features.
"A few minutes after you dismiss alarm, we'll confirm you are actually awake."
Let’s add Pro features on your alarm!
The payment has been processed. You now have access to Alarmy Pro.
"No commitment. Cancel anytime. If you do not cancel auto renewal until 24 hours before the current period ends, you'll be automatically charged via your Play Store account."

"Recurring billing, cancel anytime in Play Store subscription management menu. If you do not cancel auto-renewal until 24 hours before the current period ends including 7-day-free trial, you'll be automatically charged via your Play Store account."
You now have access to all of Alarmy Pro.
It is not charged right now, Free Trial for 7 Days
"You're a special supporter for us! You can use all Pro features for life, including those to come."
Tap each feature to find out how it works.
"There are %s features you haven't tried out"
Dismiss screen will keep coming up when you try to turn off
On duty: we won’t let you escape
We’ve got your back. Focus on your alarm.
Only thing left is to dismiss your alarm!
"Need Screen Time permission Only active while your alarm is ringing"
"Please allow Screen Time permission to use Prevent app uninstall"
"You can't uninstall Alarmy while your alarm is ringing"
Manage everything from Sleep to Wake-up
We wake up 3 million people every morning. Set your alarm now and make your morning successful
"Scan a code of a part of your morning routine"
"Tap the button in the corner to close the ad"
✨ Fresh AND double XP? Yes please!
Reward not ready yet. Please try again.
An error has occurred. Please restart the app
Preparing the reward. Please try again a moment later.
Too much and my tummy hurts! 😅
Let’s eat in just a little bit ⚡
Too full to eat right now 😅
Kibble’s fine but… I really want cake 🍰
Can I have a special treat today? 🍰✨
"Thx 4 playing w me today! Here's a gift!"
"My gifts are NOT for anyone. It's just for u!"
Ice cream is calling my name!
"Glad ur awake! Now gimme ice cream!"
"Dismiss ur alarm and gimme ice cream!"
This ticket might be the one!
"How much ru gonna win today? Show mee!"
"How much will it be? Can't wait!"
"Help me grow and get cool stuff!"
Do I smell…? I need a wash!
Wanna wash with that body wash! 😌
Body wash keeps you smelling great all day! 🫧
Bonus points for first sign in!
"Buy gift cards with the points you collected"
Ooh what could ur fortune be... 🔮
"Go check ur fortune today! I wanna see!"
"Pick a card any card for ur fortune today ✨"
Come back when Larmy wakes up
Wake me now, eyes wide open! ✨
Will you need an umbrella today? Be prepared for unpredictable weather.
Enable location for accurate prayer times
Your opinion will help us improve Alarmy
"First time setting alarm! How’s Alarmy so far?"
"%s days since we met! How was Alarmy?"
Your rating will be a big help!
Exit without saving the recorded sound?
Send a message to use in store
"Show this message to the store staff"
"Show the OTP number you received to the manager"
Please remember the code before receiving the gift value
Going back will delete your message. Are you sure you want to delete it?
Conversations started from this app will be visible here.
"If permission is not granted it won't work. Please grant the permission"
Location permission is needed to check the weather for your location
"Need location permission to show your local weather"
Participate in events I want and get pleasant rewards!

Set by default in the editor when adding alarms
Next Alarm will appear as a notification
"Caution!! If you set this on, you can't power off while the alarm is ringing"
\"Prevent phone turn-off\" is not supported on this device.
"If you set this on, you can't uninstall Alarmy. If you want to uninstall Alarmy please turn off this option."
"We're developing features to make your mornings more successful."
Not muted when the max limit is exceeded
Turn off alarm if unresponsive for a certain amount of time
What type of feedback will you give us?
Does it happen every time you repeat your action? <font color=#eb0019> *</font>
We can resolve it faster for you if reproducible steps are provided.
Tell us your situation or thoughts.
Let us know your email address to send reply to.
Please enter a valid email address.
e.g., In [a circumstance], I did [something] and expected [this], but [bug description] happened.
" Please check your network connection and try again."
"Message has been successfully sent. Thank you."
Theme color has been set to Blue.
Theme color has been set to Green.
Your language has been set to %s
Theme color has been set to Red.
Theme color has been set to Violet.
Would you like to exit now?
You can register again with the same account. Come back anytime!
By proceeding, you are agreeing to our Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy.
"Your Google account's name field is empty. Please fill in the info and come back."
Oops, something went wrong. If this persists, please leave us a feedback.
Sign in to save more than 500 points
"Log in now to save your pending points"
Guest accounts can only hold up to %s points
Your points may be lost if you sign out
Are you sure you want to sign out?
"Points earned while logged out won't be saved, but your existing points are safe"
"Your points may be lost Sign in to save them safely"
Use the sleep tracking 3 times and see how you slept!
No good morning after poor sleep
Find out why your mornings are so tired
Keep for %s more minutes to get your sleep report
At least 30 minutes of sleep analysis is necessary to see your results
Shorter time means better sleep quality
"Time it took to fall asleep after tracking started"
Please connect your device to the charger to keep it running
"You can minimize the screen. Sleep tracking keeps going."
Continue for more than 30 minutes to get a detailed report.
Listen to sleep sounds to help you get deep sleep.
Make sure to keep your device charging and place it near your pillow
"You can’t wake up well with poor sleep"
You’ll know if you snored all night by detecting snoring
"Fall asleep deep and fast with sleep sounds"
"Analyze how you slept with your breathing"
"Sleep is the issue! Let’s check if you woke up during sleep."
"Sleep is the issue! Let’s check sleep latency."
"Sleep is the issue! Let’s check how much you slept."
"Sleep is the issue! Let’s check deep sleep ratio."
You can get up to %s of sleep
Good sleep is crucial for brain health, immunity, and hormone balance
Total tracking time minus time awake
Place your device next to you and focus on sleep
No worries, will be used only for sleep tracking!
Connect to the network to use more ringtones.
Mic permission needed to detect snoring
Clear storage space to check snore recordings
After a week, snoring sounds will be automatically deleted
"Millions of people are building successful mornings"
Something went wrong, please set again
"This sound won't be available until it's downloaded"
Rings a super loud alarm if you are unresponsive for 40 seconds.
Reads out the label when your alarm rings
Are you sure you want to proceed?
Reads out current time every minute while your alarm is ringing.
"Tap the area below again with your arms by your sides"
Find out how - quick and easy!
Make alarm with my bias celebrity
"Your discount will be lost if you exit. Leave anyway?"
"Hi Larmy, we need to verify your student status"

"- Elementary, middle, or high school students (Must be enrolled in regular education curriculum) - University/college students (Must be enrolled in accredited higher education programs of 2 years or longer)"
If student status cannot be verified, additional documentation may be required or the subscription may be canceled.
"After one week of free trial, you'll be charged %s per year."
By proceeding with upgrade, remaining period of your monthly plan will be added.
Enjoy the full package for %s a year!
"Try using Pro again at the lowest price ever"
Alarmy Pro will help you out.
Did you know? It takes average of 66 days to grow the habit of waking up on regularly.
"Why don't you give it another try until the habit becomes yours?"
Pro users are building a new habit, saving average 32 minutes every morning.
Take your time before making up your mind
"Set alarms with Pro features you haven't tried out!"
"%s days left in your free trial. Take your time to decide."
"You may go back to oversleeping in %s days"
"You can no longer use Pro features"
"Get Pro at the lowest price ever"
"Keep using Pro at the lowest price ever"
"Jot down a motivating quote or today’s to-do"
"Start your morning hearing your own messages"
"Wake up instantly with a surprise loud sound!"
"After 40 seconds, BOOM! Loud sound comes out"
"Step out of bed and get walking - it really works!"
"Match the symbols and kickstart your brain"
"Hear the time, Wake up on time"
"Falling back asleep? Alarmy Pro is for you!"
"One alarm is enough with Alarmy Pro"
"We’ll keep checking - Are you really awake?"
"You’ll be notified 2 days before trial ends"

Recurring billing, cancel anytime in Play Store subscription management menu. If you do not cancel auto renewal until 24 hours before the current period ends including 7-day-free trial, you’ll be automatically charged via your Play Store account. You can use all free features even if you do not subscribe after free trial.
You can use all free features even if you do not subscribe.
None of the above? Tell us your reason.
"We'd love to know what we could've done better."
Why are you leaving Alarmy Pro?
Unused balance from current plan automatically refunded

"Alarmy can detect when power off system UI appears on the screen. The feature is intended to prevent you from turning the device off. It does not have any affect when your alarm is not ringing.
We promise not to collect any of your private data, so no worries."

Allow the following 2 permissions to make sure your alarms ring.
Allow the following 3 permissions to make sure your alarms ring.
Allow the following 4 permissions to make sure your alarms ring.

Starts from minimum volume and rises to the volume you set.
Starts from minimum volume and rises to the volume you set
Raise volume to hear the sound
The wake-up habit for %s days is a bonus!
Wake up every day with an alarm and get a gift
"Set a time to receive your Wake Up Check. You will get a (quiet) pop-up asking to confirm you're awake."

"You only have 100 seconds to confirm. If you miss it, your alarm will start ringing again.
(Yes, you'll have to complete your mission again.)"
Tap here and complete Wake Up Check or your alarm will be reactivated.
You aren’t still in bed, right?
"Alarm dismissed. Wake Up Check will start in %s minutes."
How long after your alarm do you want your check?
An alarm can’t be edited during Wake up Check
Consistent wake time makes getting up easier
When you finally dismissed your alarm
"6 wake-ups with Alarmy, Mystery prize is yours"
Tap the Button to Confirm You’re Awake
"Use it only if you're fully awake"
"I swear that I'm awake completely and there will be no regret turning off wake up check."
Once you confirm it by typing the sentence above, it will be turned off
"We check if you're actually awake after alarm is dismissed"
When to follow up after alarm dismissal?
Create your alarm with your favorite photos or videos
"If you stop now, you'll need to restart the download from the beginning"
"Couldn't download wallpaper, switched to default image"
"Hang tight, we're getting the latest weather info for you."
Weather will be notified 30 mins after dismissing the alarm
"Example: Current temperature is 75°F and it's raining right now."
"Hear today's weather when this alarm rings?"
Here’s today’s weather. Current temperature is 24 degrees. It’s raining right now. Today’s high is 28 degrees, and the low is 16 degrees.
Here’s today’s weather. Current temperature is 72 degrees. It’s raining right now. Today’s high is 75 degrees, and the low is 60 degrees.
"Ring in %s We’ll let you know the weather"

Then tap the + button on left top

Sorry, the Android camera encountered a problem. You may need to restart the device.
Place a barcode inside the viewfinder rectangle to scan it.
